overview.title: What Parents Say About Us
overview.description: Hear from the families who are part of the Bright Future School community.

items.name: Parent Name
items.text: Bright Future School has been a wonderful environment for my child. The teachers are caring and dedicated, and the facilities are excellent. My child has grown so much — academically and as a person. I am very happy with this school.

items.name: Parent Name
items.text: We have been part of the Bright Future family for over four years and couldn't be happier. The school genuinely cares about every child's wellbeing and progress. Communication between parents and teachers is open and excellent.

items.name: Parent Name
items.text: My daughter loves coming to school every single day. The teachers make learning fun and engaging. The campus is safe, clean, and beautifully maintained. I highly recommend this school to every parent.

items.name: Parent Name
items.text: The academic support and board exam preparation at Bright Future School is outstanding. My son's confidence and results have improved significantly. The teachers go above and beyond to help every student succeed.

note: Testimonials shown are placeholders only and will be replaced with actual parent reviews before the website goes live.
